nasb.text: They gave him a piece of fig cake and two clusters of raisins, and he ate; then his spirit revived. For he had not eaten bread or drunk water for three days and three nights.

esv.text: and they gave him a piece of a cake of figs and two clusters of raisins. And when he had eaten, his spirit revived, for he had not eaten bread or drunk water for three days and three nights.

cnv.text: 又給他一塊無花果餅，兩個葡萄餅。他吃了，精神就恢復過來，因為他已經三天三夜沒有吃東西，沒有喝水了。

ccb.text: 还给他一块无花果饼和两个葡萄饼。他吃完后，恢复了体力，因为这人已经三天三夜没吃没喝了。
